auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Sendbird API token used with the Api-Token header. Find it in Sendbird Dashboard under Settings > Application > General > API tokens: https://sendbird.com/docs/chat/platform-api/v3/prepare-to-use-api.

extraFields.label: Application ID
extraFields.description: The Sendbird application ID used in the Platform API base URL, for example https://api-{application_id}.sendbird.com/v3.

actions.name: add_members_group_channel
actions.description: Invite members into an existing Sendbird group channel.

channel_url.description: The unique URL of the target group channel.

hide_existing_messages.description: Whether to hide previous messages from the invited users.

seconds.description: The hide-existing-messages duration in seconds when required by Sendbird.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for adding members into a group channel.

channel_url.description: The unique URL of the group channel.

actions.name: ban_user_from_group_channel
actions.description: Ban a user from a Sendbird group channel.

channel_url.description: The unique URL of the target group channel.

seconds.description: The ban duration in seconds. Omit for a permanent ban.

agent_id.description: The moderator ID performing the action.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for banning a user from a group channel.

outputSchema.description: The moderation result returned by Sendbird.

actions.name: create_channel
actions.description: Create a Sendbird group channel with common JSON body fields.

channel_url.description: The custom channel URL to create.

cover_url.description: The cover image URL to assign to the channel.

custom_type.description: The custom type to assign to the channel.

data.description: The custom data payload to store for the channel.

is_distinct.description: Whether the channel should be distinct.

is_public.description: Whether the channel should be public.

is_super.description: Whether the channel should be a supergroup.

is_ephemeral.description: Whether the channel should be ephemeral.

is_discoverable.description: Whether the channel should be discoverable when supported by Sendbird.

access_code.description: The access code for a private public channel.

strict.description: Whether Sendbird should fail if a matching channel already exists.

message_survival_seconds.description: The message survival duration in seconds when supported by Sendbird.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a group channel.

channel_url.description: The unique URL of the group channel.

actions.name: create_user
actions.description: Create a Sendbird user with common profile and metadata fields.

nickname.description: The nickname to assign to the new user.

profile_url.description: The URL of the user's profile image.

metadata.description: A metadata object whose keys and values are strings.

issue_access_token.description: Whether Sendbird should issue an access token for the user.

is_active.description: Whether the user should be active.

phone_number.description: The phone number to store for the user.

has_ever_logged_in.description: Whether the user has logged in before when supported by Sendbird.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a Sendbird user.

user_id.description: The unique ID of the user.

actions.name: delete_channel
actions.description: Delete a Sendbird group channel.

channel_url.description: The unique URL of the target group channel.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting a group channel.

actions.name: delete_message
actions.description: Delete a Sendbird group channel message.

channel_url.description: The unique URL of the target group channel.

message_id.description: The numeric identifier of the Sendbird message.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting a group channel message.

actions.name: delete_user
actions.description: Delete a Sendbird user.

hard_delete.description: Whether to permanently delete the user and related data.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting a Sendbird user.

actions.name: get_number_of_channels_by_join_status
actions.description: Get Sendbird group channel counts grouped by join status.

super_mode.description: Filter by whether the channel is a supergroup.

public_mode.description: Filter by whether the channel is public.

distinct_mode.description: Filter by whether the channel is distinct.

hidden_mode.description: The hidden-mode filter supported by the official API.

unread_filter.description: The unread filter supported by the official API.

state.description: When provided, only the specified join-state count is requested.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting group channel counts by join status.

total.description: The total count of joined and invited group channels.

joined.description: The number of channels the user has joined.

invited.description: The number of channels the user has been invited to.

invited_by_friend.description: The number of channels the user was invited to by a friend.

invited_by_non_friend.description: The number of channels the user was invited to by a non-friend.

outputSchema.description: The aggregated group channel counts by join status.

actions.name: get_number_of_unread_items
actions.description: Get unread message, mention, and invitation counts for a Sendbird user.

anyOf.description: A comma-separated unread item key list.

item_keys.description: The unread item keys to retrieve.

custom_types.description: The custom channel types to filter the counts by.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting unread item counts.

outputSchema.description: The unread item counts returned by Sendbird.

actions.name: issue_session_token
actions.description: Issue a Sendbird session token for a user.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for issuing a Sendbird session token.

actions.name: leave_group_channels
actions.description: Make a Sendbird user leave one or more joined group channels.

should_leave_all.description: Whether the user should leave all joined group channels.

custom_type.description: Restrict the leave operation to channels with this custom type.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for leaving group channels.

actions.name: list_banned_members
actions.description: List banned users from a Sendbird group channel.

channel_url.description: The unique URL of the target group channel.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return.

token.description: The pagination token returned by the previous response.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing banned users.

user_id.description: The unique ID of the banned user.

items.description: A banned user record returned by Sendbird.

banned_list.description: The banned users returned by Sendbird.

anyOf.description: The pagination token for the next page, or null when there is no next page.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing banned users.

actions.name: list_group_channel_messages
actions.description: List messages from a Sendbird group channel around a timestamp or message anchor.

channel_url.description: The unique URL of the target group channel.

message_id.description: The numeric identifier of the Sendbird message.

prev_limit.description: The number of messages to return before the anchor.

next_limit.description: The number of messages to return after the anchor.

include.description: Whether to include the anchor message.

reverse.description: Whether to reverse the result ordering.

sender_id.description: Restrict results to a single sender ID.

sender_ids.description: Restrict results to the provided sender IDs.

message_type.description: Restrict results to the provided Sendbird message types.

custom_types.description: Restrict results to the provided custom message types.

operator_filter.description: Filter by whether the sender is an operator.

include_reply_type.description: The reply-type filter supported by Sendbird.

include_parent_message_info.description: Whether to include parent message information.

with_sorted_metaarray.description: Whether to include sorted metaarray values.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing group channel messages.

anyOf.description: The pagination token for the next page when Sendbird returns one.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing group channel messages.

actions.name: list_group_channels
actions.description: List Sendbird group channels in the application with common filtering controls.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return.

token.description: The pagination token returned by the previous response.

name.description: Filter by an exact channel name.

show_member_info.description: Whether to include detailed member information when supported by Sendbird.

super_mode.description: Filter by whether the channel is a supergroup.

public_mode.description: Filter by whether the channel is public.

distinct_mode.description: Filter by whether the channel is distinct.

hidden_mode.description: The hidden-mode filter supported by Sendbird.

members_nickname.description: Filter channels by a member nickname match.

url_contains.description: Filter by a substring of the channel URL.

my_member_state.description: Filter by the member state reported by Sendbird.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing group channels.

channel_url.description: The unique URL of the group channel.

channels.description: The group channels returned by Sendbird.

anyOf.description: The pagination token for the next page, or null when there is no next page.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Sendbird group channels.

actions.name: list_members_group_channel
actions.description: List members of a Sendbird group channel.

channel_url.description: The unique URL of the target group channel.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return.

token.description: The pagination token returned by the previous response.

order.description: The ordering of the returned members.

muted_member_filter.description: Filter by whether the member is muted.

nickname_startswith.description: Filter by a member nickname prefix.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing group channel members.

user_id.description: The unique ID of the member.

anyOf.description: The pagination token for the next page, or null when there is no next page.

total_count.description: The total number of matching members when Sendbird returns it.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing group channel members.

actions.name: list_users
actions.description: List Sendbird users with common pagination and filtering controls.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return.

token.description: The pagination token returned by the previous response.

order.description: The result ordering returned by Sendbird.

nickname.description: Filter by an exact nickname match.

nickname_contains.description: Filter by a nickname substring match.

nickname_startswith.description: Filter by a nickname prefix supported by the official API.

show_bot.description: Whether to include bot users in the results.

custom_type.description: Filter by the user custom type when supported by Sendbird.

has_ever_logged_in.description: Filter by whether the user has logged in when supported by Sendbird.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Sendbird users.

user_id.description: The unique ID of the user.

anyOf.description: The pagination token for the next page, or null when there is no next page.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Sendbird users.

actions.name: mark_all_user_messages_as_read
actions.description: Mark all messages as read for a Sendbird user.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for marking all messages as read.

actions.name: mute_user
actions.description: Mute a user in a Sendbird group channel.

channel_url.description: The unique URL of the target group channel.

seconds.description: The mute duration in seconds. Use 0 for an indefinite mute when supported by Sendbird.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for muting a user in a group channel.

outputSchema.description: The moderation result returned by Sendbird.

actions.name: revoke_all_session_tokens
actions.description: Revoke all Sendbird session tokens for a user.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for revoking all session tokens.

actions.name: send_message
actions.description: Send a message into a Sendbird group channel.

channel_url.description: The unique URL of the target group channel.

message_type.description: The Sendbird message type to create.

data.description: The custom data payload for the message.

custom_type.description: The custom type assigned to the message.

mention_type.description: The mention type for the message.

parent_message_id.description: The parent message ID when creating a thread reply.

is_silent.description: Whether the message should be silent.

is_operator_message.description: Whether the message should be marked as an operator message.

push_notification_delivery_option.description: The push notification delivery option to use.

user_id.description: The metadata user ID when provided.

metaarray.description: The metadata entries to store for the message.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for sending a group channel message.

actions.name: unban_user
actions.description: Unban a user from a Sendbird group channel.

channel_url.description: The unique URL of the target group channel.

banned_user_id.description: The banned user ID to unban from the channel.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for unbanning a user from a group channel.

outputSchema.description: The moderation result returned by Sendbird.

actions.name: unmute_user
actions.description: Unmute a user in a Sendbird group channel.

channel_url.description: The unique URL of the target group channel.

muted_user_id.description: The muted user ID to unmute from the channel.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for unmuting a user in a group channel.

outputSchema.description: The moderation result returned by Sendbird.

actions.name: update_group_channel
actions.description: Update a Sendbird group channel with common JSON body fields.

channel_url.description: The unique URL of the target group channel.

custom_type.description: The custom type to assign to the channel.

data.description: The custom data payload to store for the channel.

is_distinct.description: Whether the channel should be distinct.

is_public.description: Whether the channel should be public.

is_super.description: Whether the channel should be a supergroup.

is_ephemeral.description: Whether the channel should be ephemeral.

access_code.description: The access code to assign to the channel.

my_count_preference.description: The count preference to store when supported by Sendbird.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for updating a group channel.

channel_url.description: The unique URL of the group channel.

actions.name: update_message
actions.description: Update an existing Sendbird group channel message.

channel_url.description: The unique URL of the target group channel.

message_id.description: The numeric identifier of the Sendbird message.

is_silent.description: Whether the update should be silent.

push_notification_delivery_option.description: The push notification delivery option to use.

items.description: An object returned by the official Sendbird API.

sorted_metaarray.description: The sorted metaarray payload to store for the message.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for updating a group channel message.

actions.name: update_user
actions.description: Update a Sendbird user's profile, metadata, or activation settings.

nickname.description: The new nickname for the user.

metadata.description: A metadata object whose keys and values are strings.

issue_access_token.description: Whether Sendbird should issue a new access token for the user.

is_active.description: Whether the user should remain active.

phone_number.description: The phone number to store for the user.

has_ever_logged_in.description: Whether the user has logged in before when supported by Sendbird.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for updating a Sendbird user.

user_id.description: The unique ID of the user.

actions.name: view_group_channel
actions.description: Get a Sendbird group channel by channel URL.

channel_url.description: The unique URL of the target group channel.

show_member.description: Whether to include the member list.

show_read_receipt.description: Whether to include read receipt data.

show_delivery_receipt.description: Whether to include delivery receipt data.

show_migration_info.description: Whether to include migration information when available.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting a group channel.

channel_url.description: The unique URL of the group channel.

actions.name: view_message
actions.description: Get a single Sendbird group channel message by message ID.

channel_url.description: The unique URL of the target group channel.

message_id.description: The numeric identifier of the Sendbird message.

with_sorted_metaarray.description: Whether to include sorted metaarray values.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting a Sendbird message.

actions.name: view_user
actions.description: Get a single Sendbird user by user ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting a Sendbird user.

user_id.description: The unique ID of the user.
